title: Input schema for Hugging Face Trending Monitor

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Listing pages or organization pages to start from.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

minLikes.title: Minimum Likes
minLikes.description: Only include items with at least this many likes (best-effort).

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Optional webhook URL to POST new/trending items to (JSON payload).

siteAllowList.title: Site allow list
siteAllowList.description: If set, only follow links inside these hostnames.
